Category 2026 ★
Towing & Payload
2026 Chevrolet Trucks & SUVs — Quick Reference Cheat Sheet
All 2026 Models Max Properly Equipped EPA Ratings
Trucks
Model Max Towing Max Payload Best Engine for Towing Notes
Colorado 7,700 lb 1,580 lb 2.7L TurboMax All trims use same engine. ZR2 trails slightly due to weight.
Silverado 1500 13,300 lb 2,280 lb 6.2L V8 or 3.0L Duramax Requires Trailering Package. RST/LTZ/HC trims reach max tow.
Silverado 2500HD 18,500 lb (gas) 3,979 lb 6.6L Duramax Diesel Diesel adds $12,495. 5th wheel/gooseneck prep available.
Silverado 3500HD 36,000 lb (diesel) 7,442 lb 6.6L Duramax Diesel DRW config for max tow/payload. Best-in-class diesel towing.
Silverado EV 10,000 lb 1,300 lb Single Motor (WT/LT) Towing significantly reduces range. Trail Boss: off-road focused.
SUVs
Model Max Towing Max Payload Notes
Trax Not rated — Not designed for towing. FWD only.
Trailblazer Not rated — Not designed for towing.
Equinox 1,500 lb 1,113 lb Light-duty towing. AWD required for max rating.
Equinox EV 1,000 lb — Light towing only. Reduces range significantly.
Blazer 4,500 lb 1,415 lb V6 required for max tow. AWD recommended.
Blazer EV 1,000 lb — Light towing only.
Traverse 5,000 lb 1,555 lb 2.5L Turbo I4 standard on all trims. AWD adds traction.
Tahoe 8,400 lb 1,685 lb 6.2L V8 for max tow. Max Trailering Package required.
Suburban 8,300 lb 1,627 lb 6.2L V8 for max tow. Slightly less than Tahoe due to weight.
Quick Sales Tips
⚠️ Always ask: what are they towing?
A boat, camper, or horse trailer all have different tongue weights. Help them match the right truck to the actual load.
📋 Trailering Package matters
Silverado 1500 needs the Trailering Package (+$695) to reach max tow rating. Without it, rating drops significantly.
🔄 GCWR vs Tow Rating
Tow rating = max trailer weight. GCWR includes the truck itself. A fully loaded Silverado tows less than an empty one.
⚡ EV towing caveat
Towing at max capacity can cut EV range by 40–50%. Silverado EV rated 400 miles unloaded may get ~200 while towing.
🏆 Silverado HD vs 1500
If a customer needs to tow over 13,300 lb, they need the HD. No exceptions — the 1500 is at its absolute limit at that rating.
🚤 Common trailer weights
Jet ski: ~1,500 lb · Bass boat: ~3,500 lb · Pontoon: ~5,000 lb · 30ft camper: ~8,000 lb · Horse trailer (2 horses): ~7,000 lb

* All ratings are maximum when properly equipped. Actual towing capacity varies by cab/bed config, drivetrain, engine, and installed options. Always verify with the window sticker GVWR/GCWR.

Corvette Stingray
2026 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray — Mid-Engine Sports Car (C8)
From $70,000 (w/ dest.)3 Trims490 HP LT2 V80-60 in 2.9s (Z51)
🚗
2026 Corvette Stingray 2LT
Image unavailable
2026 Corvette Stingray 2LT — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

All trims available as Coupe (removable targa roof) or Convertible (+$7,500 — power-retractable hardtop). MSRP includes $1,695 destination fee. Convertible top lowers in 16 seconds at up to 30 MPH.

1LT
$70,000 Coupe / $77,500 Convertible
  • 6.2L LT2 V8 — 490 HP / 465 lb-ft
  • 8-speed dual-clutch transmission
  • 12.7-inch center console display
  • 14-inch driver information center
  • 6.6-inch auxiliary touchscreen display
  • Bose 10-speaker audio
  • GT1 bucket seats (Mulan leather)
  • Forward collision warning + AEB
  • Lane keep assist
  • Rear camera mirror
  • Leather steering wheel airbag cover (NEW 2026)
  • Head-up display
2LT
~$78,000 Coupe / ~$84,500 Convertible
  • All 1LT features
  • Heated & ventilated front seats
  • Wireless phone charging
  • Navigation
  • Bose 14-speaker premium audio
  • Blind-spot warning w/ rear cross-traffic alert
  • Performance Data & Video Recorder standard
  • Front lift system available
  • GT2 bucket seats available (+$1,695)
3LT
~$86,000 Coupe / ~$91,500 Convertible
  • All 2LT features
  • GT2 performance bucket seats (Napa leather) standard
  • Full leather interior wrap
  • Memory driver seat
  • Habanero interior available (NEW 2026 — 3LT only)
  • Blue stitch on Black interior available (NEW 2026 — 3LT only)
Performance & Option Packages
Z51 Performance Package (RPO Z51)
All trims — 1LT, 2LT, 3LT
+$5,995
  • Performance-tuned suspension with wider rear track
  • Larger Brembo brakes (front & rear)
  • Electronic limited-slip differential (eLSD)
  • Performance exhaust (+5 HP = 495 HP / 470 lb-ft)
  • Wider rear tires: 305/30ZR20
  • Newly redesigned Z51 rear spoiler (NEW 2026)
  • Front splitter & brake cooling ducts
  • Enhanced cooling system
  • 0-60: 2.9 sec / Quarter mile: 11.2 sec
✓ Works with all packages✓ Z51 spoiler replaces standard spoiler on Appearance Packages
Magnetic Selective Ride Control 4.0 (RPO FE2)
All trims
+$1,895
  • Magnetorheological adaptive dampers — continuously adjusting
  • Fluid with metal particles changes viscosity in milliseconds
  • Tour, Sport, Track, and MyMode settings
✓ Can combine with Z51✓ Available on all trims
Front Lift System w/ Memory (RPO E60)
2LT, 3LT
+$1,495 (2LT) / +$2,595 (3LT)
  • Raises front splitter ~2 inches at low speeds
  • Speed-programmable memory locations
  • Prevents front end scraping on steep driveways
GT2 Bucket Seats (RPO AH2)
2LT only (standard on 3LT)
+$1,695
  • Napa leather with perforated sueded microfiber inserts
  • Carbon-fiber seat back halo
  • Dual-density foam for lateral support
Competition Sport Seats
2LT, 3LT
+$1,995
  • Napa leather + performance textile in high-wear areas
  • Maximum lateral support for track driving
Carbon Fiber Interior Trim (RPO FA5)
2LT, 3LT
+$1,500
  • Carbon fiber instrument cluster surround
  • Carbon fiber console/door switch plate trim
✗ Not on 1LT
Sueded Microfiber Steering Wheel (RPO N26)
All trims
+$695
  • Suede-like microfiber wrapped steering wheel
  • Enhanced grip for performance driving
Custom Leather Wrapped Interior Package
2LT, 3LT
+$1,625
  • Leather-wrapped upper instrument panel
  • Leather-wrapped door trim panels
  • Leather-wrapped console
Sueded Microfiber Upper Interior Trim Package
2LT, 3LT
+$995
  • Sueded headliner, visors, A-pillar trim
  • Trim above windshield and rear window
Removable Transparent Roof Panel (Coupe only)
All coupe trims
+$995
  • Tinted glass removable roof panel
  • See the engine through the rear glass hatch
✗ Coupe only — cannot be combined with CF roof
Removable Carbon Fiber Roof Panel (Coupe only)
All coupe trims
+$1,495
  • Visible-weave carbon fiber removable roof panel
  • Lighter than transparent panel
✗ Coupe only — cannot be combined with transparent roof
Performance Data & Video Recorder (RPO UQT)
1LT (+$1,300) — Standard on 2LT/3LT
+$1,300 on 1LT
  • Records video with overlaid performance data (G-force, speed, gear)
  • Downloadable to app or SD card
Engine Appearance Package (RPO B6P/ZZ3) — Coupe only
All coupe trims
~$995
  • Includes Engine Specification Plaque (NEW 2026)
  • Engine Lighting (DV3) included when ordered (NEW 2026)
  • Engine Bay Closeout Graphics (Coupe only, NEW 2026)
  • Rear Hatch Strut Bracket in Edge Red w/ Crossed Flags Logo (Coupe only, NEW 2026)
2026 Spring Appearance Packages (Value Bundles ~$3,000)

Each package bundles performance exhaust, racing stripes, color-matched calipers, carbon flash mirrors/spoiler, and specific wheels at a significant discount vs. ordering separately. Available on ALL trims.

Adrenaline Red Accent Package (RPO PCH)
Torch Red, Arctic White, or Black exterior
~$3,000 (adjusted MSRP)
  • Performance Exhaust (NPP)
  • Stingray dual racing stripe (DZV/DZX) — Carbon Flash/Edge Red
  • Torch Red seat belts (3F9)
  • Bright Red brake calipers (J6F)
  • Black wheel finish (Q8Q/Q9I/QE5)
  • Requires: Adrenaline Red interior
Edge Orange Accent Package
Black or Arctic White exterior
~$3,000 (adjusted MSRP)
  • Performance Exhaust (NPP)
  • Edge Orange dual racing stripes (DSY)
  • Orange seat belts (379)
  • Carbon Flash painted mirrors & spoiler (ZYC)
  • Black wheel finish
  • Requires: Jet Black interior
Tension Blue Accent Package (RPO PCI)
Arctic White exterior ONLY
~$3,000 (adjusted MSRP)
  • Performance Exhaust (NPP)
  • Edge Blue dual racing stripes (DUW)
  • Tension Blue seat belts (3A9)
  • Carbon Flash painted mirrors & spoiler (ZYC)
  • 5-Split Spoke Satin Graphite wheels (Q90)
  • Requires: Sky Cool Gray interior
Velocity Yellow Accent Package
Riptide Blue, Arctic White, or Hysteria Purple exterior
~$3,000 (adjusted MSRP)
  • Performance Exhaust (NPP)
  • Competition Yellow/Carbon Flash racing stripes
  • Yellow seat belts (3M9)
  • Velocity Yellow brake calipers (J6E)
  • Carbon Flash mirrors & spoiler
  • Black wheel finish
  • Requires: Jet Black interior

Standard Z51 / +$595 standalone

Blue Calipers

Interior Color Options by Trim

The 2026 Stingray offers up to 23 interior colorways. Seat belt colors automatically match the interior. Higher trims unlock more options.

Black (default)
Torch Red (Adrenaline Red Dipped)

Orange (Habanero — 3LT only)
Natural (Natural Dipped)
Interior Color Seat Material 1LT 2LT 3LT Belt Color

Jet Black w/ Blue Stitch ★Napa Leather (3LT)✗✗✅Black

★ = New for 2026. Habanero & Blue Stitch are exclusive to 3LT. Seat belt colors are automatic and cannot be changed separately from interior selection.

Full-Length Dual Racing Stripes

All stripes are Carbon Flash base with a colored pinstripe accent. Run full length from crossed-flag emblem on the nose to the rear spoiler. Each ~$1,195. Available on all trims, Coupe and Convertible. NEW for 2026: Blue accent stripe (DPB).

Competition Yellow Stripe (DT0/DZU)
Carbon Flash w/ Yellow pinstripe — RPO DT0 or DZU · ~$1,195
Edge Orange Stripe (DSY)
Carbon Flash w/ Orange pinstripe — RPO DSY · ~$1,195
Edge Red Stripe (DZV/DZX)
Carbon Flash w/ Red pinstripe — RPO DZV (Torch Red ext.) or DZX (Arctic White/Black) · ~$1,195
Edge Blue Stripe (DUW/DPB) ★ NEW 2026
Carbon Flash w/ Blue pinstripe — RPO DPB · ~$1,195 · NEW for 2026
Silver Stripe
Carbon Flash w/ Silver pinstripe · ~$1,195
Wheel Options (19F / 20R)

Standard wheels are 5-open-spoke Carbon Flash-painted aluminum with machined edge. Upgrade options below — all are 19-inch front / 20-inch rear forged aluminum.

5-Open-Spoke — Carbon Flash Machined Edge
Standard — No charge · Forged aluminum
5-Split-Spoke — Sterling Silver (Q90)
Forged aluminum · ~$1,495

Forged aluminum · ~$1,495

Forged aluminum · ~$1,495
5-Split-Spoke — Satin Graphite (Q90 alt.)
Forged aluminum · ~$1,495 · Standard on Tension Blue Package
5-Split-Spoke — Bright Polished (Q99)
Forged aluminum · ~$1,995

~$595 — Included in Appearance Packages

Corvette E-Ray
2026 Chevrolet Corvette E-Ray — First Electrified AWD Corvette (C8)
From $108,600 (w/ dest.)3 Trims655 HP Hybrid AWD0-60 in 2.5s
🚗
2026 Corvette E-Ray 1LZ
Image unavailable
2026 Corvette E-Ray 1LZ — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Convertible adds $7,500. MSRP includes $1,695 destination. The E-Ray is the ONLY Corvette with AWD — standard on all trims via a front-mounted electric motor. Stealth Mode lets you run on electric power only at low speeds.

1LZ
$108,600 Coupe / $116,100 Conv.
  • 655 HP hybrid eAWD — LT2 6.2L V8 + 160 HP front eMotor
  • E-Ray exclusive Stealth Mode (EV-only at low speed)
  • Bose premium audio · Front, side, and rear cameras
  • Blind-spot warning + rear cross-traffic
2LZ
~$118,000 Coupe
  • All 1LZ features
  • Heated & ventilated seats · Wireless charging · Navigation
  • GT2 seats available (+$1,695)
  • Front Lift System available
3LZ
~$126,000 Coupe
  • All 2LZ features · GT2 seats standard (Napa leather)
  • Full leather interior · Memory driver seat
  • Habanero interior available (3LZ only) ★
  • Blue Stitch on Black available (3LZ only) ★

+$1,695
  • Napa leather + perforated sueded microfiber · Carbon-fiber halo

All trims
+$3,995
  • Visible-weave CF front splitter, rocker panels, rear diffuser

All trims
+$595
  • Bright Red · Velocity Yellow ★ NEW 2026 · Blue
Dual Racing Stripes (5 colors)
All trims
+$1,195 each
  • Competition Yellow, Edge Orange, Edge Red, Edge Blue ★ NEW 2026, Silver

Corvette Z06
2026 Chevrolet Corvette Z06 — Flat-Plane V8 Track Beast (C8)
From $120,300 (w/ dest.)3 Trims670 HP LT6 V80-60 in 2.6s

2026 Corvette Z06 2LZ
Image unavailable
2026 Corvette Z06 2LZ — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Convertible adds $7,500. MSRP includes $1,695 destination. Z06 uses unique 20F/21R wheels and distinct body panels with massive side air intakes for the LT6 engine.

1LZ
$120,300 Coupe / $127,800 Convertible
  • 5.5L LT6 flat-plane NA V8 — 670 HP / 460 lb-ft
  • 8-speed dual-clutch transmission
  • Z06-specific 20/21-inch aluminum wheels
  • Electronic limited-slip differential
  • Carbon fiber rear spoiler
  • Bose premium audio · Blind-spot warning

~$126,000 Coupe
  • All 1LZ features

  • Wireless charging · Navigation
  • GT2 seats available (+$1,695)
  • Front Lift System available

~$140,000 Coupe
  • All 2LZ features
  • GT2 performance seats standard (Napa leather)

  • Habanero available (3LZ only) ★
  • Blue Stitch on Black available (3LZ only) ★

All trims
+$8,995

  • Stiffer front & rear sway bars

Corvette ZR1
2026 Chevrolet Corvette ZR1 — Most Powerful Production Corvette Ever (C8)
From $185,000 (w/ dest.)2 Trims1,064 HP Twin-Turbo233 MPH~300 Units Built
🚗
2026 Corvette ZR1 3LZ
Image unavailable
2026 Corvette ZR1 3LZ — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

⚠️ Sales Note: The 2026 ZR1 is extremely limited (~300 total units produced). Most dealers received 0–1 units. Market pricing is typically well above MSRP. Convertible adds $7,500. MSRP includes $1,695 destination.

1LZ
$185,000 Coupe
  • LT7 5.5L Twin-Turbo Flat-Plane V8 — 1,064 HP / 828 lb-ft
  • 8-speed DCT · RWD · 0-60: 2.3 sec · 233 MPH
  • Carbon fiber body panels, roof, hood
  • CF ground effects package standard
  • Bose Centerpoint audio · Head-Up Display
3LZ
~$197,000+ Coupe
  • All 1LZ features
  • GT2 performance seats standard (Napa leather)
  • Full leather interior · Memory driver seat · PDR
  • ~96% of buyers chose 3LZ
  • New 2026: Santorini Blue, Very Dark Atmosphere, Ultimate Suede interiors
Performance Packages
ZTK Track Performance Package
All trims
+~$10,000
  • CCM Brembo carbon ceramic brakes — zero brake fade on track
  • Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2R tires
  • Gurney flap high-downforce rear wing · Enhanced aero package
  • 2026 upgrade: enhanced brakes and new accessible drive mode
Jake Design Package (3LZ)
3LZ only
+$895
  • Jake skull hood graphic + interior accent stitching
Brake Caliper Colors (Red/Yellow/Blue)
All trims
+$595
  • Velocity Yellow ★ NEW 2026 · Bright Red · Blue
Dual Racing Stripes (5 colors)
All trims
+$1,195 each
  • Carbon Flash + Yellow/Orange/Red/Blue/Silver accent pinstripe

Interior Colors — 2026 Updates

2026 ZR1 adds significant new interior options including refreshed infotainment and new color choices.

Standard (1LZ/3LZ)
  • Jet Black · Sky Cool Gray · Adrenaline Red
  • Natural · Tension Blue · Artemis Green
NEW 2026 Additions ★
  • Santorini Blue interior (new)
  • Very Dark Atmosphere (new)
  • Ultimate Suede (new)
  • Sky Cool Gray / Medium Ash 2-tone (new)
Full-Length Dual Racing Stripes
Competition Yellow (DT0/DZU)
~$1,195

~$1,195
Edge Red (DZV/DZX)
~$1,195
Edge Blue (DPB) ★ NEW 2026
~$1,195
Silver Stripe
~$1,195
Engine
5.5L LT7 Twin-Turbo Flat-Plane V8 — DOHC 32-Valve
Most powerful production Corvette engine ever. Derived from the Z06's LT6 block with twin turbos added. New for 2026: enhanced infotainment with Performance Package drive mode access.

🚗
2026 Trax LT
Image unavailable
2026 Trax LT — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

All prices include $1,195 destination & handling fee. FWD only on all trims. Single 1.2L Turbo engine standard.

LS
$21,495 MSRP
  • 8-inch infotainment touchscreen
  • Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto
  • Chevy Safety Assist (6 features)
  • 17-inch steel wheels w/ covers
  • Manual A/C, keyed ignition
  • 4-speaker stereo
  • Interior: Jet Black/Gray cloth w/ Blue accents
1RS
$23,200 MSRP
  • RS exterior — black grille insert, black bowties
  • 18-inch black-painted machined aluminum wheels
  • Heated flat-bottom steering wheel
  • Heated front seats
  • Remote start & keyless entry
  • Interior: Jet Black/Gray cloth w/ Red accents
LT
$23,200 MSRP
  • 11-inch infotainment + 8-inch DIC
  • 17-inch gray-painted machined aluminum wheels
  • Push-button start, auto climate control
  • 6-speaker audio system
  • Roof rails standard
  • Interior: Jet Black cloth/Evotex w/ Blue or Yellow accents
2RS
$25,400 MSRP
  • 19-inch machined aluminum wheels
  • LED daytime running lights
  • RS exterior accents + black bowties
  • Heated driver & passenger seats
  • Heated steering wheel
  • Wireless charging pad
  • Interior: Jet Black Evotex w/ Red accents
ACTIV
$25,400 MSRP
  • Body-color grille insert, ACTIV badge
  • 19-inch black-painted machined aluminum wheels
  • 8-way power driver seat w/ lumbar
  • Heated power outside mirrors
  • High-gloss black mirror caps
  • Wireless charging pad
  • Interior: Jet Black Evotex w/ Yellow or Artemis accents

LS Convenience Package (RPO ZFT)
LS only
+$995
  • Remote start
  • Keyless entry
  • Push-button start
  • Automatic climate control
✓ Pairs with Driver Confidence Package
Driver Confidence Package (RPO WPA)
All 5 trims — Adaptive Cruise on LT/2RS/ACTIV only
+$395 (LS/1RS) · +$795 (LT/2RS/ACTIV)
  • Lane Change Alert w/ Side Blind Zone Alert
  • Rear Cross Traffic Alert
  • Rear Park Assist

✓ Compatible with all packages✗ No Adaptive Cruise on LS or 1RS
Sunroof Package (RPO ZL3)
1RS, LT, 2RS, ACTIV — NOT LS
+$795 (1RS) · +$895 (LT/2RS/ACTIV)
  • Power tilt/slide moonroof
  • Wireless charging pad included on LT, 2RS, ACTIV (not 1RS)
✗ Not available on LS✓ Pairs with Driver Confidence Package
Interior Protection Package (RPO PDH)
All 5 trims
+$395
  • All-weather front & rear floor liners
  • Cargo area all-weather liner/mat
✓ Compatible with all other packages
Roof Rack Cross Rails (RPO VLL)
LT, 2RS, ACTIV only
+$450
  • Factory cross rails for roof cargo systems
  • Compatible with GM-approved roof boxes & carriers
✗ Not available on LS or 1RS
3 Years OnStar Connected Services (RPO PRB)
All 5 trims
+$800
  • 3-year OnStar plan (remote lock/unlock, vehicle diagnostics)
  • Emergency services, roadside assistance
  • Remote vehicle access via myChevrolet app
✓ Available on all trims
Midnight Edition Package
Select trims
~$695
  • High-gloss black exterior trim accents
  • Black bowtie badges (front & rear)
  • Blacked-out grille surround
✓ Pairs with most packages
GM-Installed Dealer Accessories

These GM-branded accessories can be dealer-installed and added to your vehicle order. Prices are approximate MSRP.

🏠 Interior Protection
  • All-weather front floor liners — ~$105
  • All-weather rear floor liner — ~$80
  • Carpeted floor mats (front) — ~$65
  • Carpeted floor mats (rear) — ~$50
  • Cargo area liner — ~$75
  • Cargo net (vertical) — ~$55
  • Collapsible cargo organizer — ~$65
  • Rear bench seat cover — ~$95
🚗 Exterior Accessories
  • Front splash guards (pair) — ~$45
  • Rear splash guards (pair) — ~$45
  • Hood protector (aeroskin) — ~$95
  • Side window deflectors — ~$80
  • Front license plate bracket — ~$25
  • Chrome door handle covers — ~$75
  • Body side moldings — ~$185
⚙️ Wheels & Tires
  • Wheel locks (set of 4) — ~$45
  • Chrome lug nut set — ~$65
  • Black lug nut set — ~$55
  • Tire inflator kit — ~$45
  • Touch-up paint (color-matched) — ~$30
📱 Tech & Convenience
  • Wireless charging pad (if not equipped) — ~$185
  • First aid kit — ~$35
  • Emergency roadside kit — ~$50
  • Folding windshield sunshade — ~$55
  • Portable 12V vacuum — ~$55
  • Remote start (if not equipped) — dealer installed
Color Options — By Trim

Not every color is available on every trim. Refer to this chart carefully. Marina Blue (+$395) is the only extra-charge color. Apex Red is NOT available on ACTIV. No two-tone options on Trax.

Color LS 1RS LT 2RS ACTIV Price

Cypress Gray		✅✗✅✗✗No charge
Apex Red		✅✅✅✅✗No charge
Marina Blue Metallic ★		✗✅✅✅✅+$395
Cacti Green		✗✗✗✗✅No charge

Trim Levels

The 2026 Equinox is available in 3 trims. All share the same 1.5L Turbo engine; AWD is optional on all trims (+$2,000).

LT
$28,800 MSRP
  • 11.3-inch infotainment touchscreen
  • 11-inch digital driver display
  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto
  • Heated front seats & heated steering wheel ★ NEW standard
  • Remote start · Chevy Safety Assist
  • 17-inch aluminum wheels · Power driver seat
RS
~$33,500 MSRP
  • All LT features
  • Sport appearance — unique RS grille & fascia
  • Flat-bottom steering wheel · 19-inch sport wheels
  • Red/Blue interior accents · Evotex seating surfaces
  • Midnight Edition available (LT & RS)
ACTIV
~$33,500 MSRP
  • All LT features
  • Adventure-oriented exterior styling
  • All-terrain tires · Gray exterior accents
  • Evotex + sueded microfiber seating surfaces
  • Off-Road mode (AWD standard on ACTIV)

🚗
2026 Equinox EV LT 2
Image unavailable
2026 Equinox EV LT 2 — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Built on GM's Ultium platform. Eligible for up to $7,500 federal EV tax credit — making the effective base ~$27,495. 2026 updates: new base model with up to 250 miles range, long-range version up to 319 miles.

LT 1 FWD
$34,995
  • Up to 250 miles range (new base)
  • 170 HP / 236 lb-ft · 17.7-inch infotainment
  • Chevy Safety Assist standard · DC Fast Charge ready (150 kW)
LT 2 FWD
~$39,000
  • Up to 319 miles range (long-range battery)
  • Wireless CarPlay/Android Auto · Heated front seats
  • Bose audio · DC Fast Charge 150 kW
2LT AWD
~$43,000
  • AWD dual-motor
  • Leather seating · Power panoramic sunroof
  • Super Cruise available
RS AWD
~$46,500
  • Sport appearance · RS-exclusive styling
  • 295 HP AWD dual-motor
  • 0-60 in ~5.3 seconds · Unique RS interior

3 trims: 2LT, 3LT, RS. Premier trim DROPPED for 2026. All trims now use 228 HP 2.0L Turbo 4-cyl as standard. V6 (308 HP) available on RS only (+$1,995). AWD optional on all trims (+$2,000 approx).

2LT
$36,095 MSRP
  • 10.2-inch infotainment touchscreen
  • 193 HP 2.0L Turbo standard
  • Heated front seats
  • Remote start & keyless entry
  • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto
  • Chevy Safety Assist standard

3LT
$40,495 MSRP

  • Bose 8-speaker audio
  • 20-inch dark-painted wheels

RS FWD
$45,395 MSRP

  • Power panoramic sunroof standard
  • Bose premium audio
  • Power rear liftgate
  • 20-inch chrome wheels
  • Leather seating
RS AWD
~$47,395 MSRP

2026 Chevrolet Blazer EV — All-Electric Midsize SUV
Starting at $44,7003 TrimsUp to 320mi RangeUltium Platform
🚗
2026 Blazer EV RS
Image unavailable
2026 Blazer EV RS — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Blazer EV offers multiple drivetrains: FWD single-motor (LT), RWD single-motor (2LT), and AWD dual-motor (RS, SS). SS is the performance flagship with 0-60 in 3.4 sec.

LT FWD
$44,995
  • Up to 293 miles range
  • 228 HP / 248 lb-ft
  • DC fast charge ready
  • Heated front seats
  • 17.7-inch infotainment
2LT RWD
$47,595
  • Up to 320 miles range
  • 288 HP / RWD motor
  • Wireless charging
  • Larger infotainment display
RS AWD
$54,995
  • AWD dual-motor
  • 0-60 under 4 seconds
  • 557 HP combined
  • Panoramic sunroof
  • RS sport appearance
SS AWD
$62,995
  • 557 HP / 648 lb-ft
  • 0-60 in 3.4 seconds
  • Brembo performance brakes
  • SS unique styling & interior
  • Super Cruise available
Option Packages
Driver Confidence Package
LT FWD, 2LT RWD
+~$1,500
  • Enhanced safety suite: Rear Pedestrian Alert, HD Surround Vision
  • Enhanced Automatic Emergency Braking
Sun & Sound Package
RS AWD
+~$1,500
  • Power panoramic sunroof
  • Bose premium audio upgrade
Interior Protection Package
All trims
+$395
  • All-weather front & rear floor liners · Cargo area liner
Roof Rack Cross Rails
RS, SS
+$295
  • Factory cross rails compatible with GM cargo systems

Starting at $40,8004 TrimsUp to 8 Seats328 HP
🚗
2026 Traverse Z71
Image unavailable
2026 Traverse Z71 — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

2026 Traverse: base is LT. Base is LT. All trims use the 2.5L Turbocharged 4-cyl (328 HP). High Country returns after a hiatus.

LT
$42,695 FWD / $44,695 AWD
  • 17.7-inch infotainment (largest in class)
  • 328 HP 2.5L Turbo I4
  • Up to 8-passenger seating
  • Standard trailer package
  • Wireless charging, power driver seat
Z71
$50,795 AWD only
  • Off-road appearance & capability
  • All-terrain tires
  • Z71 unique front fascia & grille
  • AWD standard, skid plates
High Country
$56,995 FWD / $58,995 AWD
  • Premium leather interior
  • Heated & ventilated front seats
  • Hands-free power liftgate
  • 22-inch premium wheels
  • Real wood/aluminum décor
RS
$57,295 FWD / $59,295 AWD
  • Sport appearance — blacked-out accents
  • Panoramic sunroof standard
  • RS-exclusive dark interior
  • Traffic sign recognition standard
Option Packages
Driver Confidence Package
LT, Z71
+$500
  • Adaptive cruise control
  • Rear cross-traffic braking
  • Enhanced safety alerts
Sun & Wheel Package
LT only
+$2,500
  • Power panoramic sunroof
  • Upgraded wheel design
Z71 Adventure Package
Z71 only
+$2,750
  • Enhanced off-road capability
  • Unique Z71 adventure equipment
Interior Protection Package
All trims
+$395
  • All-weather floor liners (front & rear)
  • Cargo liner
Roof Rack Cross Rails
All trims
+$295
  • Factory-approved cross rails for cargo systems
Engine
2.5L Turbocharged I4 — Standard on ALL Trims
Note: The 3.6L V6 that powered previous Traverse generations is GONE for 2026. This new turbo 4-cyl makes MORE power with better fuel economy.

$66,495 RWD / $68,995 4WD

RST
$71,495 RWD / $73,995 4WD

Z71
$73,495 4WD only
  • Off-road suspension & all-terrain tires

$78,395 RWD / $80,895 4WD

High Country
$81,995 RWD / $85,495 4WD
  • 6.2L V8 standard

Suburban
2026 Chevrolet Suburban — Full-Size SUV (Largest in Class)
Starting at $66,4956 Trims144.7 cu ft CargoUp to 9 Seats
🚗
2026 Suburban LT
Image unavailable
2026 Suburban LT — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Suburban shares its platform, engines, and trim structure with the Tahoe — but is 20 inches longer with significantly more cargo space and a 3rd-row that seats 3 adults comfortably. Up to 9-passenger seating.

LS
$66,495 RWD / $68,995 4WD
  • 5.3L V8 · Up to 9-passenger seating
  • 17.7-inch infotainment · Up to 8,300 lb towing
  • 144.7 cu ft max cargo (best in class)
LT
$69,495 RWD / $72,495 4WD
  • Heated front seats
  • Power liftgate · Tri-zone climate control
  • Leather-appointed seating
RST
$74,495 RWD / $77,495 4WD
  • Sport appearance · Black exterior accents
  • RST badging · 6.2L V8 available
Z71
$76,495 4WD only
  • Off-road suspension & all-terrain tires
  • Skid plates · Z71 unique grille & fascia
Premier
$81,395 RWD / $84,395 4WD
  • Premium perforated leather
  • Bose 10-speaker surround · Heated/ventilated front seats
  • Power-release 2nd row seats
High Country
$84,305 RWD / $87,305 4WD
  • 6.2L V8 standard · 22-inch premium wheels
  • Head-up display · Super Cruise available
  • Real wood décor
Engines (Same as Tahoe)
5.3L EcoTec3 V8 (Standard LS–Premier)

2026 Suburban Interior Colors

Confirmed via GMAuthority. All trims use bucket seats unless noted. Materials upgrade with each trim level.

Trim Interior Color Code Material / Notes
LS Jet Black Premium Cloth H0U Bucket seats or 40/20/40 bench
LS Gideon / Very Dark Atmosphere Premium Cloth HV5 Bucket seats or 40/20/40 bench — two-tone look
LT / Z71 Jet Black Leather H0Y Leather-appointed, bucket seats
LT / Z71 Gideon / Very Dark Atmosphere Leather HVC Leather-appointed, bucket seats
RST Jet Black / Victory Red Perforated Leather HVA Sport-inspired red stitching — RST exclusive
Premier Jet Black Perforated Leather H1Y Premium perforated leather, bucket seats
Premier Jet Black / Sky Cool Gray Perforated Leather HUN Two-tone premium leather — Premier exclusive
High Country Jet Black Perforated Leather HMR Premium leather + real wood décor — HC exclusive
High Country Jet Black / Mocha Perforated Leather HVB Warm two-tone leather + real wood décor — HC exclusive

Colorado
2026 Chevrolet Colorado — Midsize Pickup
Starting at $32,4005 Trims7,700 lb Towing310 HP TurboMax
🚗
2026 Colorado Z71
Image unavailable
2026 Colorado Z71 — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

All 2026 Colorados use the 2.7L TurboMax I4 (310 HP / 430 lb-ft). The base 2.7L was discontinued for 2026. Every trim is crew cab with a 5'2" bed.

WT
$32,400 RWD / $35,700 4WD
  • 11.3-inch touchscreen · 11-inch DIC
  • Google built-in · Wireless CarPlay/Android Auto
  • Chevy Safety Assist · 17-inch wheels
LT
$38,095 RWD / $41,395 4WD
  • EZ Lift & Lower tailgate · StowFlex storage
  • Remote start · Heated front seats
  • Wireless charging available
Trail Boss
$42,495 4WD only
  • 1.5-inch front lift · 32-inch all-terrain tires
  • 18-inch wheels · Limited-slip rear diff
  • 2-speed transfer case
Z71
$46,495 4WD only
  • Sport-tuned suspension · Dual-zone auto climate
  • Heated front seats standard · Power driver seat
  • 9.5-inch ground clearance
ZR2
$52,895 4WD only
  • Multimatic DSSV dampers
  • Front & rear locking diffs · Rock sliders
  • 33-inch tires · 10.7-inch clearance
  • 5 drive modes incl. Baja · Leather interior
Option Packages
LT Convenience Package
LT only
+$3,750
  • Wireless charging pad · Extra USB ports · 120V power outlets
Technology Package
Trail Boss, Z71, ZR2
+$950–$1,450
  • Bose premium audio (Z71, ZR2) · Underbody cameras (Z71, ZR2)
Midnight Edition Package
Trail Boss, Z71, ZR2
+$3,825–$4,195
  • Blacked-out exterior badges & trim · Unique appearance
ZR2 Bison Edition
ZR2 only
+$11,700
  • AEV-designed steel bumpers · 35-inch tires (12.2-inch clearance)
  • Stronger skid plates · Recovery equipment
Off-Road Bumper Package
Trail Boss, ZR2
+$3,995–$4,250
  • Aggressive off-road front bumper · Enhanced approach angle
Engine
2.7L TurboMax I4 — Standard on ALL Trims
The base 2.7L was discontinued. All 2026 Colorados now come with the more powerful TurboMax. Variable oil pump and Active Thermal Management for efficiency.

Midnight Edition Package
Available on: Custom, LT, RST
+$1,595

Available on: LT, LTZ, RST
+$1,695

Trailering Package
Available on: WT, Custom, LT, RST
+$695

Safety Package II
Available on: LT, RST, LTZ
+$1,095

✓ Pairs with all packages
Super Cruise Package
Available on: High Country only
+$2,200
  • Super Cruise hands-free driving
  • Automatic Lane Change
  • Automatic speed limit
✗ High Country only

Available in both 2500 (3/4-ton) and 3500 (1-ton) configurations with regular, double, and crew cab body styles. The 3500 can tow up to 36,000 lbs in gooseneck configuration.

WT
~$46,000 MSRP
  • 6.6L Gas V8 · Allison 10-speed auto

~$54,000 MSRP

2026 Silverado EV LT — Official 2026 Model Year
Trim Levels

Silverado EV features the Multi-Flex Midgate for extended bed length. AWD standard on all trims. Massive 200 kWh battery pack enables industry-leading range and fastest DC charging.

WT AWD
~$55,895
  • 510 HP / AWD standard
  • Up to 400 miles range
  • Multi-Flex Midgate
  • 17-inch infotainment
  • 10,000 lb towing
LT AWD
~$68,000
  • All WT features
  • Leather seating
  • Full-size bed or extended bed (Midgate)
  • Hands-free driving available
  • Wireless charging
RST AWD
~$75,000
  • Sport appearance
  • 754 HP (First Edition)
  • 0-60 in 4.5 sec (std) / under 4 (perf)
  • Super Cruise standard
  • Premium leather & audio
Option Packages
Max Range Battery (LT, RST)
LT, RST
+~$6,000
  • Larger battery pack for extended range up to 400 miles
Work Package (WT)
WT only
+~$1,500
  • Additional work-focused upfitter switches and connections
  • Enhanced fleet monitoring capability
Technology Package (LT, RST)
LT, RST
+~$2,000
  • Super Cruise hands-free driving (on mapped highways)
  • Enhanced driver assistance suite
Interior Protection Package
All trims
+$395
  • All-weather floor liners front & rear · Cargo liner
Spray-In Bedliner
All trims
+$595
  • Factory-applied permanent bed protection

2026 Silverado EV Interior Colors

All trims use Evotex synthetic leather. Trail Boss gets exclusive two-tone.

Trim Interior Color Code Notes
WT (all range configs) Black Evotex H9F Standard on all WT trims
LT (all range configs) Black Evotex H9F Standard
LT (with Plus/Premium Pkg) Black / Artemis Evotex EB9 With Plus or Premium Package
Trail Boss Extended Range Black / Artemis Evotex EB9 Exclusive to Trail Boss — Red accent stitching
Trail Boss Max Range Black / Artemis Evotex EB9 Standard — Red accent stitching

💡 Multi-Flex Midgate: The Silverado EV's Midgate allows you to fold the rear seats and extend cargo from the cab into the truck bed — creating up to 10+ feet of total cargo length for long items like lumber or kayaks.

Finish Types Explained
Solid — Single-layer paint. Clean, classic look. Most affordable.
Metallic — Contains metal flakes for sparkle and depth. Very popular.
Tintcoat — 3-stage paint with rich, deep color. Premium appearance.
Tricoat — 3 layers including a pearl/shimmer mid-coat. Most prestigious finish.
Matte — Non-reflective flat finish. Unique, requires special care.
🛠️ Sales Tools
Quick-reference resources to help close more deals on the showroom floor.

Click any objection to expand the rebuttal. Practice these until they're second nature.

I completely understand — price is a big factor. Let's look at the total picture: with current APR offers and Chevy's loyalty/conquest incentives, your monthly payment might be closer than you think. Plus Chevy's resale holds strong — you're protecting that investment. What monthly number were you targeting?
The F-150 is a solid truck — no question. But here's where Silverado wins the head-to-head: best-in-class diesel towing (Duramax), the only full-size with a 6.2L V8 as an option across multiple trims, and Chevy ranked higher than Ford in J.D. Power Initial Quality. What specifically drew you to the F-150? Let me show you how we stack up on that.
Absolutely — it's a big decision. Can I ask what's giving you pause? If it's price, we have tools to work on that today. If it's features, let me make sure you've seen everything this model does. The risk of waiting is inventory — this exact trim/color combination may not be here next week. What would make you confident saying yes today?
That's worth exploring together. If another dealer has a lower price on the exact same vehicle — same trim, options, color — bring that number in and we'll do our best to match or beat it. What I can promise is our service department and relationship won't be cheaper anywhere else. What's their number?
Ram does a great interior — especially the 1500 Limited. But compare our High Country side-by-side: open-pore wood trim, 13.4-inch touchscreen, Super Cruise hands-free driving, and available Umber leather. Plus Silverado outsells Ram significantly — there's a reason contractors and families trust it. What interior feature matters most to you?
Smart to think ahead — the 2027 Silverado will be all-new. But here's the reality: first model year of a redesign usually means higher prices, less inventory, and early production bugs. The 2026 is a proven, refined truck with major incentives available right now. You get all the value without being a test pilot. What feature are you hoping the 2027 adds?
That's fair — and you don't have to. The gas Silverado is still the best-selling truck in America for a reason. But if you're curious: the Silverado EV offers 400+ miles of range, 10,000 lb towing, and works as a giant generator for your home or job site. No pressure — let's focus on what fits your life. Do you do a lot of highway driving?
Let's work backward from your number. What payment works for your budget? We can adjust the term, look at current Chevy financial incentives, review your trade-in value, or find a trim that hits your target. I'd rather get you in the right truck at the right payment than lose you over a number we might be able to move.
Of course — that's a smart approach. While you do, here's what I'd suggest checking: total out-the-door price (not just MSRP), dealer fees, and what service looks like after the sale. When you come back — and I hope you will — bring those numbers and let's see what we can do. Can I get your contact info so I can reach out if this unit gets sold?
I'm sorry to hear that — every bad experience matters. What happened? Depending on the issue, I can speak to what's changed. Modern Chevy quality scores are at historic highs — J.D. Power, Consumer Reports, and NHTSA all back that up. And our service department's reputation here is something I'm personally proud of. What would it take to earn your trust?

Side-by-side comparisons for the most common cross-shop scenarios.

Silverado 1500 vs Ford F-150
Chevrolet Competitor
Max Towing ✓ 13,300 lb (Duramax diesel) 13,000 lb (PowerStroke)
V8 Option ✓ 6.2L V8 — 420 HP (multiple trims) 5.0L V8 — 400 HP
Diesel Engine ✓ 3.0L Duramax I6 — 495 lb-ft torque 3.0L Power Stroke — 440 lb-ft
Hands-Free Drive ✓ Super Cruise — available on HC BlueCruise — available
Starting MSRP ✓ $36,900 (WT excl. dest.) ~$36,760 (Regular)
J.D. Power IQS ✓ Higher than F-150 in 2024 Below segment avg in 2024
Bed Lengths ✓ 5'8", 6'6", 8' options 5'7", 6'5", 8' options
💡 Key pitch: Silverado's Duramax makes more torque, and the 6.2L V8 is available on more trims than Ford's 5.0L.
Silverado 1500 vs Ram 1500
Chevrolet Competitor
Max Towing ✓ 13,300 lb 12,750 lb
Interior Quality ✓ HC: open-pore wood, leather, Super Cruise Limited: standard-setting luxury
Air Suspension ✓ Not available Available — Ram advantage
Diesel ✓ 3.0L Duramax — 495 lb-ft 3.0L EcoDiesel — 480 lb-ft
Starting MSRP ✓ $36,900 ~$40,000+
Coil Spring Rear ✓ Leaf spring (WT-LTZ), coil (HC/ZR2) Coil spring — Ram advantage on ride
💡 Key pitch: Silverado tows more and starts cheaper. Ram wins on ride quality. If they love Ram's interior, show them our High Country.
Equinox vs Honda CR-V
Chevrolet Competitor
Starting MSRP ✓ $28,800 ~$31,000
Engine ✓ 1.5L Turbo — 175 HP 1.5L Turbo — 190 HP
AWD ✓ Available all trims (+$2,000) Available (+$1,500)
Screen Size ✓ 11.3-inch standard 9-inch standard
Heated Seats/Wheel ✓ Standard on LT+ Available on EX+
Cargo (seats up) ✓ 63.5 cu ft max 69.8 cu ft max — CR-V wins
Warranty ✓ 3yr/36K basic, 5yr/60K powertrain 3yr/36K basic, 5yr/60K powertrain
💡 Key pitch: Equinox starts cheaper, has a larger screen standard, and heated seats/wheel come sooner in the lineup.
Colorado vs Toyota Tacoma
Chevrolet Competitor
Engine ✓ 2.7L TurboMax — 310 HP / 430 lb-ft 2.4L Turbo — 278 HP / 317 lb-ft
Max Towing ✓ 7,700 lb 6,500 lb
Max Payload ✓ 1,580 lb 1,440 lb
Off-Road ✓ ZR2 w/ DSSV dampers, locking diffs TRD Pro — solid off-road
Starting MSRP ✓ $32,400 (Crew Cab) ~$33,500 (Crew Cab)
Turbo Diesel Option ✓ No (gas only) No (gas only)
💡 Key pitch: Colorado makes more power and tows more than Tacoma. ZR2 is a legitimate ZR2 Bison-level off-roader out of the box.
Tahoe vs Ford Expedition
Chevrolet Competitor
Max Towing ✓ 8,400 lb 9,300 lb — Expedition wins
Third Row ✓ Standard, folds flat Standard, power-fold
Diesel Option ✓ 3.0L Duramax — 495 lb-ft Not available
Starting MSRP ✓ $63,495 ~$60,000
Hands-Free Drive ✓ Super Cruise available Not available
Cargo (all seats up) ✓ 25.5 cu ft 20.9 cu ft — Tahoe wins
💡 Key pitch: Tahoe has more cargo behind the third row, available diesel, and Super Cruise. Expedition tows slightly more.

Key 2026 changes by model — perfect for returning customers asking "what's different this year?"

Trax
  • • 2 new colors: Apex Red (GAS) and White Sands (G42)
  • • Price increase — now from $21,700
  • • No mechanical changes
Trailblazer
  • • 2 new colors: Apex Red and White Sands
  • • New spare tire & wheel option
  • • Midnight Edition package available on LT
Equinox
  • • Polar White Tricoat replaces Iridescent Pearl (RS & ACTIV)
  • • Drive mode selector now standard on LT
  • • 2nd price increase — LT now ~$30,795 w/dest
Equinox EV
  • • Habanero Orange and Polar White Tricoat added
  • • Pricing adjustments
  • • No range or powertrain changes
Blazer
  • • Premier trim DROPPED — now 3 trims: 2LT, 3LT, RS
  • • 3 new colors: White Sands, Polar White Tricoat, Magnus Gray Matte Metallic
  • • Minor content adjustments
Blazer EV
  • • RWD discontinued — AWD only for 2026
  • • 3 trims: LT, RS, SS
  • • Magnus Gray Matte Metallic added (SS Trail Boss)
Traverse
  • • Polar White Tricoat added (RS & HC only)
  • • Snowdrift Metallic added
  • • Minor package changes
Tahoe / Suburban
  • • Polar White Tricoat added (replaces Iridescent Pearl)
  • • New LS Custom Edition appearance package
  • • New Key Card feature
  • • New Dark Essentials styling package
Colorado
  • • White Sands added (Trail Boss & ZR2)
  • • Snowdrift Metallic and Reef Blue Metallic added
  • • New Bronze Accent Package
  • • New wheel options
Silverado 1500
  • • White Sands & Polar White Tricoat added (replace Iridescent Pearl & Slate Gray)
  • • New RST Select Edition special package
  • • ZR2 gets Multi-Flex Tailgate & Tech Package standard
  • • Sport Exhaust Calibration (LPO) added
  • • Final year of 4th-gen — 2027 will be all-new
Silverado HD
  • • White Sands & Polar White Tricoat added
  • • 2WD deleted from LT and LTZ trims
  • • Minor package changes
  • • Final year of current generation
Silverado EV
  • • New Trail Boss trim added
  • • 3 new colors exclusive to Trail Boss: White Sands, Polar White Tricoat, Magnus Gray Matte
  • • RST trim discontinued
  • • Expanded LT range lineup
Corvette (all)
  • • New interior with 3-screen layout (12.7" + 14" + 6.6" displays)
  • • 2 new exterior colors: Blade Silver Metallic & Roswell Green Metallic
  • • Blue brake calipers now available on E-Ray and Z06
  • • New ZR1X hybrid supercar added to lineup
  • • Sea Wolf Gray & Accelerate Yellow discontinued
